targets.query: from(bucket: "metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: count) |> yield(name: "count")
from(bucket: "metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count) |> last()
from(bucket: "metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events") |> group(columns: ["event_type"]) |> count()
